title: User Settings
description: Simulation defaults and planning assumptions configured by the user.

settings_id.description: System-generated unique identifier for the settings record.

user_id.description: User to whom these settings belong.

retirement_age.description: Expected retirement age for simulation purposes.

life_expectancy_age.description: Optional planning end age for long-range retirement simulation.

salary_growth_rate.description: Default annual salary growth assumption expressed as a decimal.

expense_inflation_rate.description: Default annual expense inflation assumption expressed as a decimal.

general_inflation_rate.description: Default inflation assumption for generic goal projections.

pre_retirement_return_rate.description: Default expected annual portfolio return before retirement.

post_retirement_return_rate.description: Default expected annual portfolio return after retirement.

risk_profile.description: Risk preference selected by the user.

scenario_profile.description: Default scenario profile used in dashboards.

surplus_allocation_mode.description: How annual surplus should be allocated for simulation.
